name: agentprivacy-revocation-mechanics
description: Consent withdrawal, key revocation, credential invalidation, and data deletion enforcement for 0xagentprivacy swordsman operations. Activates when designing how to undo a previous delegation, implementing right-to- be-forgotten enforcement, building credential revocation infrastructure, or managing the lifecycle end of any trust relationship or authorisation. Triggers: "revoke", "revocation", "withdraw consent", "delete data", "right to be forgotten", "nullifier", "credential invalidation", "undo delegation", "consent expiry", "relationship termination".
